scripts.build: pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk-core build && pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk-browser build && pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk-react build && pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk-react-ui build && pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk build && pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk-agent build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk-core test && pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk-browser test && pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk-react test && pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk-react-ui test && pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk test && pnpm --filter @xkova/sdk-agent test
scripts.check:publint: publint packages/sdk --strict && publint packages/sdk-core --strict && publint packages/sdk-react --strict && publint packages/sdk-react-ui --strict && publint packages/sdk-browser --strict && publint packages/sdk-agent --strict
scripts.check:attw: bash -lc 'status=0; attw --pack packages/sdk --profile esm-only --exclude-entrypoints ./ui/styles.css --format table || status=1; attw --pack packages/sdk-core --profile esm-only --format table || status=1; attw --pack packages/sdk-react --profile esm-only --format table || status=1; attw --pack packages/sdk-react-ui --profile esm-only --exclude-entrypoints ./styles.css --format table || status=1; attw --pack packages/sdk-browser --profile esm-only --format table || status=1; attw --pack packages/sdk-agent --profile esm-only --format table || status=1; exit $status'
